plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Cocher cette case désactivera les messag: Checking this box will disable plugin update messages in the message center.
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Délai maximal aléatoire (en secondes) aj: Maximum random delay (in seconds) added to the launch of each SSH collection to avoid simultaneous execution with other plugins. 0 = disabled, max = 30. (Default = 15)
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Facteur multiplicateur des cycles intern: Multiplier factor for internal daemon cycles (Main=2s / Comm=1s / Event=1s). Does not affect NUT polling or status monitoring. Default = Normal (x1)
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Intervalle en secondes de la surveillanc: Interval in seconds for ups.status monitoring (power failure detection). Default = 5. Automatically reduced to 2s if the UPS is running on battery power.
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Intervalle en secondes entre chaque inte: Interval in seconds between each complete UPS query (all metrics). Default = 60
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Le démon devra être redémarré après la m: The daemon will need to be restarted after changing this setting.
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Les dépendances devront être relancées a: Dependencies will need to be restarted after saving this setting.
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Permet de forcer l'installation des mise: Allows you to force the installation of system updates
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Permet de forcer la réinitialisation de: Allows you to force a reset of the Python environment used by the plugin
Allows you to force a reset of the Venv environment used by the plugin
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Version de PyEnv utilisée par le plugin: PyEnv version used by the plugin (to be specified on Community)
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Version de Python utilisée par le plugin: Python version used by the plugin (to be specified on Community)
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Version du plugin NUT Free à indiquer su: Version of the NUT Free plugin to be specified on Community
plugins\/Nut_free\/plugin_info\/configur.Version du plugin SSH-Manager à indiquer: Version of the SSH-Manager plugin to be specified on Community
